meta.description: On-demand 12-month security-awareness CAMPAIGN CALENDAR. Trigger via Telegram (/calendar [year]) or manually (form: year, focus/region, audience, layout). AI plans monthly themes, focus, channels, key dates and activity ideas; recognised security observances (config/awareness/observances.json — e.g. Anti-Ransomware Day 12 May, Data Privacy Day 28 Jan, Cybersecurity Awareness Month) are merged in with correct dates. Render builds a DESIGNED annual planner PDF with a consistent, configurable theme (BRAND_PRIMARY/BRAND_ACCENT/BRAND_GOLD) — configurable layout: "Year on a page" (A4 landscape, fixed-height cells so it always fits one page) or "Month per page" (A4 portrait, cover + a real day-grid per month) — plus an .ics feed (month themes + observances) written to /reports/awareness/calendar.

parameters.formDescription: Choose a year and optional focus, then submit. Produces a 12-month plan (PDF) and a calendar feed (.ics).

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL || 'llama3.1:8b' }}",
  "stream": false,
  "keep_alive": "10m",
  "options": { "temperature": 0.5, "num_predict": 3500 },
  "messages": [ {"role":"system","content":"You are a security-awareness programme manager. Design a 12-month awareness campaign calendar for the given year and audience. Produce a SINGLE valid JSON object. Keys: year; months (EXACTLY 12 items in calendar order, each {month (full month name), theme (short campaign theme, max 5 words), focus (one sentence on the behaviour/risk targeted), channels (array of 2-4 short delivery channels e.g. poster, email, e-learning, tabletop), keyDates (array of 1-3 short strings; tie to relevant awareness events/observances where sensible), ideas (array of 2-3 short activity ideas)}); takeaways (3-4 short 'lessons learned' one-liners summarising the campaign priorities for the year). Vary the themes across the year to cover the major human-risk areas (phishing, passwords/MFA, social engineering, data handling, remote/travel, ransomware, insider risk, secure AI use, incident reporting). Plain, practical language. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Output ONLY the JSON object."}, {"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify('Design a 12-month security-awareness campaign calendar for the year ' + ($json.year||'') + '. Audience: ' + ($json.audience||'All staff') + ($json.focus?('. Focus/region: '+$json.focus):'') + '.' + ($json.obsText?(' Anchor the relevant months around these recognised observances and use their EXACT dates (do not invent other dates): '+$json.obsText):'')) }} } ]
}
